description_long: This is a soft, slouchy handbag made from a textured, light blue-gray material, likely leather or faux leather, with a single long, brown strap attached at both ends. The bag appears to have a flexible, unstructured body, giving it a casual and relaxed appearance, and the strap is thin and adjustable with visible metal hardware. The opening of the bag is wide and somewhat irregular, suggesting it may use a drawstring or open-top design, and the interior is partially visible, showing a loosely packed form. There are no visible external pockets or compartments, and the overall shape is asymmetrical, with the bag collapsing in on itself when not filled. The surface is matte with a subtle grain, and there are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements.
description: A soft, slouchy light blue-gray handbag with a long brown strap and a flexible, unstructured body. The bag has a matte, textured surface and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bag's collapsed, slouchy form and the full length of the brown strap.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the bag's flexible body and the strap's attachment points.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bag's broad, unstructured surface and the strap lying flat.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the bag's opening and the way the strap loops around the top.
attribute_strap_type: Single long shoulder or crossbody strap, thin, brown, adjustable, attached at both ends with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top, possibly drawstring or unstructured with no visible closure mechanism.
